description: This file defines Express.js route handlers for recommendations-related API endpoints in a career navigator application. It includes endpoints for initial role recommendations, recommendation pools, role comparison, and direct trajectory suggestions, with fallback mechanisms and integration with various services and schemas.

methods.name: getInitialRecommendationsHandler
methods.description: Returns the handler function for initial recommendations API.

methods.name: _coercePersonaJson
methods.description: Parses and normalizes persona JSON input from various formats.

methods.name: _readFinalPersonaFromRequest
methods.description: Extracts final persona JSON from request query or body.

methods.name: _computeTimeBudgetMs
methods.description: Calculates time budget for recommendations endpoint to respect timeouts.

methods.name: _computeStoreCount
methods.description: Determines the store count for explore recommendations, with environment variable override.

methods.name: handleInitialRecommendations
methods.description: Handles GET requests for initial role recommendations, with fallback to default roles.

methods.name: handleRecommendationsPool
methods.description: Handles GET requests for explore recommendations pool, reusing cached data.
